nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 夜鹰科
nodes.summary: 夜鹰科（Caprimulgidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联76种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等76种鸟类。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联42种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等42种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Fiery-necked nightjar
nodes.summary: Fiery-necked nightjar（Fiery-necked nightjar，学名 Caprimulgus pectoralis），分类上属于夜鷹目，并归入夜鹰科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于森林，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、灌丛。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 夜鷹目
nodes.summary: 夜鷹目（Caprimulgiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联83种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等83种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is usually found in forests, savannas, shrublands and grasslands.BirdLife International

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: |date=2022 |title=Fiery-necked Nightjar (Caprimulgus pectoralis), version 1.1 |url=https://birdsoftheworld.org/bow/species/finnig1/cur/introduction |journal=Birds of the World |language=en |doi=10.2173/bow.finnig1.01.1 |issn=2771-3105 |url-access=subscription}} It is most often found in woodland savannas or other deciduous woodlands. It is usually distinguished by its tawny coloured collar which gives the species its common name. It has a distinctive call that many have rendered as 'good-lord-deliver-us'. The fiery-necked nightjar is an insectivorous species that mostly eats butterflies, moths and other insects. The fiery-necked nightjar breeds after the dry season and typically produce two clutches with two eggs per clutch.{{Cite journal |last=Jackson |first=H

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is usually found in forests, savannas, shrublands and grasslands.BirdLife International
